description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth white exterior, decorated with a large red rose and green leaves made from icing on the top surface. The cake features piped red lettering that reads 'Happy Women's Day' and additional text on a white icing plaque attached to the side. The sides of the cake are finished with horizontal ridges, giving it a textured appearance. The cake sits on a square white base, likely a tray or board, which provides support and presentation. The overall look is festive and celebratory, with a floral and elegant decorative style. The cake appears to be made primarily of sponge cake and icing, with no visible candles or other adornments.
description: A round, single-tier white cake with a red rose and green leaves on top, piped lettering, and a white plaque on the side, displayed on a square white tray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red rose and green leaves on top, with the white plaque partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the piped 'Happy Women's Day' message and the white plaque with red text clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the green leaves and the edge of the red rose, with the plaque mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the red rose and green leaves, with minimal text or plaque visible.
